---
title: "Lecture 9 Quiz: CSS Units & Advanced Selectors"
jupyter: julia-1.12
---

::: {.callout-note}
Review before quiz:
[Lectures](/lectures/lecture-09.qmd) | [Week 3 Content](/content/week-03.qmd) | [Lab 3](/labs/lab-03.qmd) | [Assignment 3](/assignment/03-assignment.qmd)
:::

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
using QuizQuestions
```

## Lecture 9 Self-Check

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
choices = ["A. px and pt", "B. em and rem", "C. cm and mm", "D. in and pc"]
question = "Question 1: Which CSS units are relative and preferred for scalable typography?"
answer = 2
radioq(choices, answer; label=question, keep_order=true)
```

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
choices = ["A. Relative to current element's font size", "B. Relative to root html font size", "C. Relative to viewport width", "D. Relative to parent width"]
question = "Question 2: `rem` units are calculated relative to what?"
answer = 2
radioq(choices, answer; label=question, keep_order=true)
```

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
choices = ["A. #header", "B. .header", "C. header", "D. *header"]
question = "Question 3: Which selector targets an element with class name `header`?"
answer = 2
radioq(choices, answer; label=question, keep_order=true)
```

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
choices = ["A. div p", "B. div + p", "C. div > p", "D. div ~ p"]
question = "Question 4: Which selector matches only direct child paragraph elements of a `div`?"
answer = 3
radioq(choices, answer; label=question, keep_order=true)
```

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
choices = ["A. a:visited", "B. a:hover", "C. a:active", "D. a:focus"]
question = "Question 5: Which pseudo-class applies style when the mouse pointer is over a link?"
answer = 2
radioq(choices, answer; label=question, keep_order=true)
```
